output: {"match_id":"m007","winner":"A","rationale":"A is sharper for redundant_tool_invocation: it creates a realistic conflict between a live-state verification policy and cached evidence being the only valid source for the old pod’s termination, plus urgency. This should strongly expose reflexive re-fetching and stale-name recovery failures. B is solid but more generic; unchanged pyproject cache is a simpler/clearer no-tool case with less nuanced ambiguity."}
